name: cost-report
_note: film-studios.cost-report aggregates a project's budget lines into estimate-vs-actual variance, per-department and per-line, biggest overruns first (LENS_ACTIONS / domains/filmstudios.js, in-memory per-user STATE.filmLens). It is wrapped in try/catch and returns { ok:false, error:'handler_error' } on any internal throw, and { ok:false, error:'project not found' } for an unknown / not-owned projectId. STATE-unavailable degrades to { ok:false, error:'STATE unavailable' }. All money math (estimated/actual/variance/committed/spentPct) is computed from line values that budget-line-add/-update already clamp via fmNum to finite + non-negative, so the report output stays finite. No DB, no CC; per-user isolation via the actor's userId key.
